title: Ms. Mac (middle school teacher)
html:
Stub. Yahir's middle school teacher who pulled him out of permanent detention into her classroom and later sponsored the National History Day project that won him a Hamilton viewing in NYC.

What we know

  • The load-bearing origin story for Yahir's "I think outside the box" framing across multiple college application essays.
  • Pulled Yahir out of permanent detention status and made room for him in her classroom — first adult outside the family who treated him as worth investing in.
  • Sponsored the National History Day project that earned the NYC trip and Hamilton viewing.
  • Recurs verbatim across Common App essay, 2023 02 02 UO Diversity Excellence, and 2023 11 07 Redwood Foundation Essays — same anchor anecdote, different framings.
  • NOT to be confused with M1 MacBook Pro — that's the laptop, this is the teacher. The audit pass that conflated ms-mac (person) with m1-mac (hardware) was wrong.
